title: PartnerManifest
description: A dev-authored knowledge-map extension — 'we measure; you annotate.' Manifests are PUBLIC. Modes RAISE detection thresholds per their envelope; they NEVER exempt. A mode only applies to processes whose code signature matches team_id (verified client-side via XPC audit token or peer-PID + code-signing check). This is judgment context, never telemetry: no user events, funnels, or sessions exist in this schema.

team_id.description: Apple Developer Team ID — the identity anchor for sender verification.

modes.description: Mode name → expected resource envelope. Low-cardinality by design.

max_sustained_cpu_percent.description: Envelope ceiling — bounded by ToS caps; hard system ceilings still apply above this.

typical_duration_minutes.description: Real modes end. 'exporting' forever is itself an anomaly — the fleet audits its annotators.
